statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from `jobs` where `waiting_for_edit_approval` = 0 and `status` = 'active' and `created_at` >= '2026-01-24'
select count(*) as aggregate from `companies` where exists (select * from `users` where `companies`.`user_id` = `users`.`id` and `email_verified_at` is not null)
select count(*) as aggregate from `candidates` where exists (select * from `users` where `candidates`.`user_id` = `users`.`id` and `email_verified_at` is not null)
select `code` from `languages` where `code` = 'en' limit 1
select * from `testimonials` where `code` = 'en'

select `companies`.*, (select count(*) from `jobs` where `companies`.`id` = `jobs`.`company_id` and `status` = 'active') as `jobs_count` from `companies` where exists (select * from `users` where `companies`.`user_id` = `users`.`id` and `email_verified_at` is not null) order by `jobs_count` desc limit 9
select * from `users` where `users`.`id` in (1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 10, 12, 14)
select * from `contact_infos` where `contact_infos`.`user_id` in (1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 10, 12, 14)
select * from `industry_types` where `industry_types`.`id` in (4, 6, 9, 12, 17, 20, 22)
select * from `industry_type_translations` where `industry_type_translations`.`industry_type_id` in (4, 6, 9, 12, 17, 20, 22)

select `jobs`.*, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `bookmark_candidate_job` on `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`job_id`) as `bookmark_jobs_count`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `applied_jobs` on `candidates`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`job_id`) as `applied_jobs_count`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `bookmark_candidate_job` on `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`job_id` and `candidate_id` = '') as `bookmarked`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `applied_jobs` on `candidates`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`job_id` and `candidate_id` = '') as `applied` from `jobs` where `waiting_for_edit_approval` = 0 and `featured` = 1 and `deadline` > '2026-01-31 06:08:58' and `status` = 'active'

select `job_categories`.*, (select count(*) from `jobs` where `job_categories`.`id` = `jobs`.`category_id` and `status` = 'active' and `deadline` >= '2026-01-31') as `jobs_count` from `job_categories` order by `jobs_count` desc
select * from `job_category_translations` where `job_category_translations`.`job_category_id` in (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9)
select `job_roles`.*, (select count(*) from `jobs` where `job_roles`.`id` = `jobs`.`role_id`) as `jobs_count` from `job_roles` limit 8
select * from `job_role_translations` where `job_role_translations`.`job_role_id` in (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)
select count(*) as aggregate from `jobs` where `jobs`.`role_id` = 1 and `jobs`.`role_id` is not null and `status` = 'active' and `deadline` >= '2026-01-31'
select count(*) as aggregate from `jobs` where `jobs`.`role_id` = 2 and `jobs`.`role_id` is not null and `status` = 'active' and `deadline` >= '2026-01-31'
